description: Placeholder BDD module for future asset management commands.

scenarios.story: As a user, I want to import an image asset into timeline metadata.
scenarios.given: An image file exists on disk.
scenarios.when: A future nextframe import-image command runs
then: assets[] gains a new image asset
The asset has a stable id

scenarios.story: As a user, I want to import an audio asset.
scenarios.given: An audio file exists on disk.
scenarios.when: A future nextframe import-audio command runs
then: assets[] gains a new audio asset

scenarios.story: As a user, I want to list project assets.
scenarios.when: A future nextframe list-assets command runs

scenarios.story: As a user, I want to remove an asset reference.
scenarios.given: An asset id exists in assets[].
scenarios.when: A future nextframe remove-asset command runs
then: Dangling references are surfaced by validate
